compressed_prompt: Write email to boss with <<title>> no commas
response:
Here’s a professional and concise email template without commas, tailored to your request:

---
**Subject:** <<Title>>

Hi [Boss's Name]

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on [brief context or purpose of the email]. [State your request or update clearly and directly.]

Let me know if you need any additional details or if there’s a better time to discuss this. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards
[Your Full Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Contact Information, if needed]
---

**Example with placeholder text replaced:**
*Subject: Project Timeline Update*

Hi Alex

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to share the revised timeline for the [Project Name] as discussed. The new deadline is [date] and the key milestones are outlined below.

Let me know if you’d like to review the details or adjust any priorities. Thank you for your guidance.

Best regards
Jordan Smith
Marketing Manager
jordan.smith@company.com
